name: Reddit, Inc.
business: Reddit generates a majority of its revenue from advertising on its platform, and also generates revenue from content licensing and products sold directly to users.

exposures.sentence: We generate a majority of our revenue through the sale of advertising on our mobile applications and website.
We also generate revenue from content licensing and products sold directly to users.
In 2025, we began integrating Reddit Answers, our AI-powered conversational search tool, into Reddit’s core search experience and rolling out to non-English languages.

This includes our shopping solution, Dynamic Product Ads, which allows advertisers to create ads directly from their product catalog and promote their products in the very conversations where Redditors are deciding what to buy.

As of December 31, 2025, machine translation is live in 35 languages and approximately one billion posts have been translated in various languages, including Spanish, French, Italian, German, Portuguese, Swedish, Dutch, and Filipino.

We face competition from large language models (LLMs) and other AI models that retrieve and synthesize information, such as those built by Google, Meta, OpenAI, and Anthropic; Redditors may choose to find information using AI tools, which in some cases may have been trained using Reddit content, instead of visiting Reddit directly.

Changes in internet search engine algorithms and dynamics could have a negative impact on traffic for our website and, ultimately, our business, results of operations, financial condition, and prospects.

catalysts.event: Beta launch of Max campaigns, an automated campaign type using AI to predict ad impression value.
catalysts.sentence: For example, in January 2026, we introduced a beta version of Max campaigns, an automated campaign type enabled by Reddit Community Intelligence and AI that predicts the value of every ad impression.

catalysts.event: Board authorized a share repurchase program for up to $1 billion of Class A common stock.
catalysts.sentence: On February 4, 2026, our Board of Directors authorized a share repurchase program to purchase up to $1 billion of our Class A common stock (the Share Repurchase Program).
